title: Objkt4Objkt
description: 5 years after the original event, let's celebrate and discover the art from the wonderful tez community! Everyone can join ! Mint 1 to 5 pieces, large edition or OE, on any tezos platform, with an affordable price (1-2 tezitos suggested). Use #objkt4objkt or #objkt4objkt2026 hashtags at mint time.
